titulos.subtitulo: Choose the option that matches your issue

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when the valve opening or closing angle is less than 30°.
problemas.solucao:
Check whether the angle formed between the opening and closing points is
above 30°. If not, adjust the opening or closing angle of the valve.

problemas.descricao: Alert for calibration time exceeded according to the configuration in the menu.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the configured time for valve calibration in the menu, ensuring that the
maximum calibration time is not exceeded.

problemas.descricao:
Occurs when the stored open and closed points are not the same during calibration
cycles.
problemas.solucao:
Check whether the open and closed points are stored correctly. If an error occurs,
repeat the calibration process to correct it.

problemas.descricao: Alert due to the valve opening or closing advancing 5° beyond the calibration.
problemas.solucao:
Check the calibration points and make a 5° adjustment in the valve opening or
closing to ensure it is within the correct range.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered by the lack of valve movement during calibration.
problemas.solucao:
Check whether the valve is receiving movement commands. If not, inspect the
pneumatic connections and calibration commands.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the valve does not execute the solenoid command.
problemas.solucao:
Check the valve and solenoid commands to ensure that the valve is responding to
the solenoid command.

problemas.descricao:
Alert triggered due to an unexpected valve position change, regardless of the
solenoid command.
problemas.solucao:
Inspect the monitor and valve to check if there were unexpected position changes
without a command. Adjust the system as necessary.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the monitor is not in safe mode.
problemas.solucao:
Check the monitor configuration and ensure it is operating in safe mode. Adjust
settings as necessary.

problemas.descricao:
Alert triggered when the line pressure exceeds 9 bar, which can permanently
damage the monitor.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the line pressure to a value below 9 bar to avoid damage. The monitor's
maximum supported pressure is 10 bar.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when the partial cycle counter reaches the configured value.
problemas.solucao:
Check the partial cycle counter value and adjust the preventive maintenance alarm
as needed.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when the total cycle counter reaches the configured value.
problemas.solucao:
The total cycle counter should not be reset regularly. Only reset it when the valve
is replaced.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when the number of operating days reaches the configured value.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the number of days configured in the menu to ensure the alert is triggered
at the correct time.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when the configured date is reached.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the configured date to ensure the monitor triggers the alert according to the
set date.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the valve opening time exceeds the configured limit.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the valve opening time in the menu, ensuring it does not exceed the
maximum limit.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the valve closing time exceeds the configured limit.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the valve closing time in the menu so that the valve closes correctly
within the specified interval.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the valve inlet pressure is above the specified range (20%).
problemas.solucao:
Check the inlet pressure and adjust it to stay within the operational range
specified in the manual.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the inlet pressure is below the specified range (20%).
problemas.solucao:
Check whether the inlet pressure is within the recommended range. Adjust as
needed.

problemas.descricao:
Alert triggered when the supply voltage exceeds the 32VDC limit for AS-Interface
and 10% for PNP and DeviceNet.
problemas.solucao:
Check the power supply and adjust it so that the voltage does not exceed 32VDC for
AS-Interface and 10% for PNP and DeviceNet.

problemas.descricao:
Alert triggered when the supply voltage is below 27V for AS-Interface and 22.8V for
PNP and DeviceNet.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust the power supply so that the voltage is above 27V for AS-Interface and
22.8V for PNP and DeviceNet.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the monitor’s internal temperature exceeds 70°C.
problemas.solucao:
Adjust environmental conditions or cooling systems to ensure the monitor's internal
temperature does not exceed 70°C.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the monitor temperature is below -20°C.
problemas.solucao:
Check the operating conditions and adjust the environment so that the internal
temperature does not fall below -20°C.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when the solenoid coil shows a short circuit.
problemas.solucao: Check the solenoid coil for a short circuit. Replace the solenoid if necessary.

problemas.descricao: Alert when the solenoid coil or cable is broken.
problemas.solucao:
Check the integrity of the solenoid coil and its cables. Replace or repair as
necessary.

problemas.descricao: Alert triggered when any PNP outputs or their loads are shorted.
problemas.solucao:
Check for short circuits on the PNP outputs. Make the necessary corrections to
restore proper operation.
